name: Artega GT
description: A two-seater sports car based on the Volkswagen New Beetle chassis.

name: Artega Scalo Super Sport
description: A concept car introduced at the 2013 Geneva Motor Show with a modified version of the Artega GT's powertrain.

name: Artega Manta
description: A two-seater sports car based on the Volkswagen Golf V chassis, announced in 2008 but never produced.

name: Artega Lupus
description: A two-seater sports car based on the Volkswagen Golf VI chassis, announced in 2010 but never produced.

name: Artega GT Limited
description: A special edition of the Artega GT with a more powerful engine and unique features.
